specification:
Type: Interactive data visualization **sim-id:** qtl-mapping-lod
**Library:** Chart.js
**Status:** Specified An interactive LOD score profile across multiple chromosomes. Users see a line graph with chromosomes arranged along the x-axis (separated by vertical dividers) and LOD score on the y-axis. A dashed horizontal line marks the significance threshold. Peaks above the threshold are highlighted and labeled with estimated QTL effect size and position. Users can adjust the threshold with a slider and toggle between additive, dominance, and total LOD components.
